title: Rename device - new name on the FMD connected card
scenario: Renamed device name is not reflected on the connected card in the Find My Device screen after renaming in Settings
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the connected device card to open Device Settings
Tap on the device name field and rename the device (e.g., change to 'My Poly Headset')
Tap Save or confirm the rename
Navigate back to the Home screen
Tap on Find My Device (FMD) from the Home screen
Observe the connected device card on the FMD screen
expected: The device card on the Find My Device screen displays the new name (e.g., 'My Poly Headset') that was set in Device Settings.
